CancelIsolateDBInstances.document: This API is used to lift isolation for instances in batch.
CancelIsolateDBInstances.name: Removes isolated instances in bulk

CreateCloneInstance.document: This API is used to create clone instances.
CreateCloneInstance.name: Create a clone instance

CreateDBInstances.document: This API is used to batch create instances.
CreateDBInstances.name: Batch create instances

CreateDBSBackup.document: This API is used to create a manual backup of an instance.
CreateDBSBackup.name: Create a manual backup for an instance

DeleteDBSBackupSets.document: This API is used to delete manual backups of instances.
DeleteDBSBackupSets.name: Delete a manual backup of an instance

DescribeDBInstanceDetail.document: This API is used to query instance details.
DescribeDBInstanceDetail.name: This example shows you how to query instance details.

DescribeDBInstances.document: This API is used to query instance list.
DescribeDBInstances.name: Queries the instance list

DescribeDBParameters.document: This API is used to obtain the current parameter settings of the instance.
DescribeDBParameters.name: View instance parameters

DescribeDBSArchiveLogs.document: This API is used to query instance archived WAL log list.
DescribeDBSArchiveLogs.name: Query instance archivelog list

DescribeDBSAvailableRecoveryTime.document: This API is used to obtain the recoverable time.
DescribeDBSAvailableRecoveryTime.name: Retrieve recoverable time

DescribeDBSBackupSets.document: This API is used to query instance backup set information.
DescribeDBSBackupSets.name: Query instance backup set information

DescribeDBSBackupStatistics.document: This API is used to query instance backup space overview.
DescribeDBSBackupStatistics.name: Query instance backup space overview

DescribeDBSBackupStatisticsDetail.document: This API is used to query backup set statistical detail.
DescribeDBSBackupStatisticsDetail.name: Query backup set statistical detail

DescribeDBSecurityGroups.document: This API is used to query instance security group information.
DescribeDBSecurityGroups.name: Querying Instance Security Group Information

DescribeDatabaseObjects.document: This API is used to query the object list in the database of a cloud database instance, including table, stored procedure, view and function.
DescribeDatabaseObjects.name: Query a database object list

DescribeDatabases.document: This API is used to query the database list of a cloud database instance.
DescribeDatabases.name: This example shows you how to query the database list.

DescribeFlow.document: This API is used to query the process status of an asynchronous task.
DescribeFlow.name: Query process status

DescribeSaleInfo.document: This API is used to query available regions.
DescribeSaleInfo.name: Query available regions

DescribeSpecs.document: This API is used to list available component specifications.
DescribeSpecs.name: Query component specifications for sale

DescribeUserPrivileges.document: This API is used to query user permissions.
DescribeUserPrivileges.name: Query user permissions

DescribeUsers.document: This API is used to query user list.
DescribeUsers.name: Queries the user list

DestroyInstances.document: This API is used to destroy instances in batch.
DestroyInstances.name: Destroy instances in batch

ExpandInstance.document: This API is used to horizontally scale out instances.
ExpandInstance.name: Scale an instance horizontally

IsolateDBInstance.document: This API is used to batch isolate instances.
IsolateDBInstance.name: Isolates instances in batch

ModifyAutoRenewFlag.document: This API is used to modify the auto-renewal flag.
ModifyAutoRenewFlag.name: Modify the auto-renewal flag

ModifyDBInstanceSecurityGroups.document: This API is used to modify cloud database security groups.
ModifyDBInstanceSecurityGroups.name: Modifying the CloudDB Security Group

ModifyDBParameters.document: This API is used to modify instance parameters.
ModifyDBParameters.name: Modify instance parameters

ModifyDBSBackupPolicy.document: This API is used to modify the instance backup strategy.
ModifyDBSBackupPolicy.name: Modify the instance backup strategy

ModifyDBSBackupSetComment.document: This API is used to modify backup notes of an instance.
ModifyDBSBackupSetComment.name: Modify the instance backup remark

ModifyInstanceName.document: This API is used to modify instance name.
ModifyInstanceName.name: Modifies the instance name

ModifyUserPrivileges.document: This API is used to modify user permissions.
ModifyUserPrivileges.name: Modify user permissions

RestartDBInstances.document: This API is used to restart database instances.
RestartDBInstances.name: Restarting Instances

UpgradeInstance.document: This API is used to scale up a TDSQL Boundless instance, which can be a primary instance or a disaster recovery instance.
UpgradeInstance.name: Scale an instance vertically
